issues.description: File does not exist. REQ-001/REQ-003 require this file to register the production MCP server with Claude Code (command='node', args=['mcp-server/dist/server.js'], env.KNOWLEDGE_ROOT='.knowledge'). The .claude/ directory exists but contains only a worktrees/ subdirectory and no JSON config files.
issues.suggestion: Create .claude/mcp_servers.json with content: {"mcpServers":{"knowledge":{"command":"node","args":["mcp-server/dist/server.js"],"env":{"KNOWLEDGE_ROOT":".knowledge"}}}}. Note: PRD constraint acknowledges this file cannot be created by Claude agents and must be created manually or via an operator-level script.

issues.description: File does not exist. REQ-002/REQ-003 require this file to register the development MCP server (command='npx', args=['tsx','mcp-server/server.ts'], env.KNOWLEDGE_ROOT='.knowledge'). Without this file Claude Code cannot auto-launch the MCP server in development sessions.

The mcp-server/dist/ directory does not exist. REQ-004 and REQ-005 require 'npm run build-mcp' to succeed and produce mcp-server/dist/server.js. TASK-006 explicitly requires verifying compilation. The dist directory is not in .gitignore so its absence indicates the build was never run or verified.
issues.suggestion: Run 'npm run build-mcp' to compile mcp-server/server.ts via tsconfig.mcp.json. Verify that mcp-server/dist/server.js is created and that 'node mcp-server/dist/server.js' starts without errors and awaits stdin input.

issues.description: REQ-014 (priority: should) requires replacing console.error() with process.stderr.write() to match the logging convention used in server.ts, watch.ts, and build-knowledge.ts. The current code at line 29 uses console.error('[GetFileSummaryTool] Failed to parse cache.json:', err) which is functionally correct (writes to stderr) but inconsistent with project convention.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: process.stderr.write(`[GetFileSummaryTool] Failed to parse cache.json: ${err}\n`);

issues.description: REQ-015 (priority: should) requires renaming 'scheduleFlushed' to 'scheduleFlush' at both its declaration (line 64) and call sites (lines 88, 94, 100). The current passive-voice name 'scheduleFlushed' is grammatically incorrect; the idiomatic active form is 'scheduleFlush'. This is cosmetic with no behavioral impact.
issues.suggestion: Rename function at line 64 from 'scheduleFlushed' to 'scheduleFlush' and update all three call sites at lines 88, 94, and 100.

issues.description: REQ-016 (priority: could) requires a code comment near the ts-morph Project instantiation at line 68 (skipFileDependencyResolution: true) documenting the trade-off: single-file incremental updates complete in under 1 second but may result in stale calledBy data for cross-file call edges. No such comment exists.
